name: Meal-in-a-Bowl Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Green pepper, seeded and sliced crosswise into rings
1/2 small Red onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
1/2 cup Pitted ripe black olives, sliced in half crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the unpeeled potatoes until they are just tender when pierced with a fork, but not mushy.
- If very small, leave them whole or cut into halves or quarters once cool enough to handle, being careful not to pull off the skin.
2. Place the potatoes in a large bowl or on a serving platter surrounded by the green pepper rings.
3. Slice the eggs crosswise and remove two yolks; arrange the slices over the potatoes.
4. Add the onion rings and olives, then sprinkle the salad with parsley.
5. In a small bowl, combine:
- 1 1/4 cups Plain low-fat yogurt
- 3 tablespoons Fresh dill (snipped)
- 2 teaspoons Fresh lemon juice
- 2 teaspoons Olive oil
- 1 1/2 teaspoons Dijon mustard
- 1/2 teaspoon Sugar
- 1/4 teaspoon Salt (optional)
- 1/2 teaspoon Freshly ground black pepper
6. Pour the dressing over the salad and gently toss.
7. Serve the salad at room temperature or chilled.
